park_name: BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars Holiday Park

reviews.review_text:
We stayed for the week with the retreat caravan national rally. Couldn’t thank the park enough for their service for our 68 odd vans.
Great big sites, clean facilities.
By far the best caravan park in WA ❤️🍷❤️

This is the best caravan park we’ve ever been to. The service, the communication, the events, the coffee and the vibrancy of the place is second to none, plus as dog lovers this caravan park just ideal. We can’t thank the team behind it all enough. It’s been a lovely experience. We’ll be back for sure.
Great place to stay with dogs. Great facilities and friendly staff. The enclosed dog yard was great. Thoroughly recommend.

This was our first stay at Southern Stars with our Aussie Shepherd Millie booked into the gig enclosure site and it was just brilliant.nit inky did we love it so did Millie.

The facilities were brilliant and the area for our Millie to run was lovely.

They had music, food trucks, wine tasting and yoga.

Highky recommend and e re booked before we left.

We had the most amazing stay at this caravan park! The facilities are absolutely beautiful and everything was so well maintained. The toilets and amenities were always spotless, which makes such a difference when travelling with kids.

The staff were all so friendly and welcoming, and there was honestly so much for the kids to do — the playground, bike track, games room and all the lovely grassy areas kept them entertained the entire stay.

Everything about this place was fantastic and we couldn’t fault a thing. Highly recommend to families or anyone looking for a relaxing getaway. We’ll definitely be back!

Great location with large well spaced caravan sites.
Excellent amenities
In a van so rooms is not applicable.  Great location, friendly staff, huge bays and super clean amenities.  Wonderful place

Our third visit to this wonderful location - just an overnighter this time, but still worth it. Our dogs love the huge off-lead paddock as a place to make new friends, whereas we make ours around the communal campfire. So easy to check in, set up and then relax. Amazing facilities and even better staff!
Beautifully maintained Park with coffee shop and lots of open space
Love this place! Grest location close to major tourist attraction in the Busselton - Margaret River area. Tranquil with outstanding facilities and friendly helpful staff.

We stayed at a fenced dog site with our German Shepherd and it was great
First time we have stayed here and the setup is awesome.
Wish more parks provided these fenced areas.

Everyone was so helpful, from check in, set up and check out.
Park is clean and great location only 10mins from Dunsborough town centre.
Can't wait to come back again.
Great grassed sites amazing place to take your dog also likes the shower and toilets facilities. Always clean.
Fantastic caravan park. Huge grassy level sites. Wide internal roads. Good toilets. We were there on school holidays and they had food vans turn up most days. Location is great. Would recommend.
One of the best parks in Australia. Great facilities and friendly staff that go above and beyond to make you feel at home. Highly recommended this place!
Fantastic. The only thing I can suggest,locks on the showers/toilets that say vacant or engaged.
By far the best caravan park we have been too! Clean, social and lots of fun. The staff are so happy and helpful, will definitely be returning ❤️

Great 4 days.  The sites are huge and so green.  Well looked after facilities.  Great communication on food trucks. Line dancing and yoga.  Went to the local winery ( walking distance).  So friendly and great pizza.   Our little dogs loved it again

Stayed at this great park for 5 nights, just outside of Vasse, between Dunsborough and Busselton. The sites are large so plenty of room to get the van in. Great facilities, laundry, playground, a massive camp kitchen with tvs and a games room. Food vans visit morning and evening, and they have a coffee kiosk onsite. Staff were very friendly and welcoming with them always cleaning and looking after the grassed areas. Toilets/Showers are combined which at peak shower times made it difficult to find a spare toilet and this would be our only minor issue which is small in the scheme of things, maybe a separate toilet only block would help. Extremely dog friendly, and we even got given a treat bag for him. They have an off leash enclosed dog park area, next to an oval and a bmx track. Great stay, will definitely be back

Great spot, perfect location to do things all the way from Hamelin Bay to Dunsborough. Jane (I think) was lovely at reception/office. Bonus to have coffee hatch in the mornings. Super clean and good facilities!
Sehr sauberer und ordentlicher Platz. Große Sites, neue Sanitäranlagen, große moderne Laundry. Top
Sehr gepflegter Campingplatz, Küche gut ausgestattet und sehr sauber. Sanitäranlagen auch relativ modern, Sauberkeit aber abhängig von den Nutzern vor einem da der Boden rotsandig ist.

We had a caravan site for 5 days along with cousins company. Ablutions were kept VERY CLEAN and all grounds beautifully manicured. Office staff and ground staff all very friendly and helpful.
The only thing that would keep me away would be NO POOL!!!!
Not many Caravan sparks don’t offer a pool and as you get older a pool is do much easier than driving to find a beach with shade and toilets. Being a BIG 4 surprising its doesn’t have a pool. Let’s hope owners reconsider a pool please. Otherwise it’s a 4star CP
From the time that caravan club membets were led to and assisted to enter bays we were impressed with everything associated with the park.

We have just spent 6 wonderful nights at your park. We had the luxury of one of your fenced sites which our little frenchie Hank loved. He enjoyed the freedom of not being on a lead or tied up all the time. From the moment we arrived we were warmly welcomed by all the wonderful staff. Being escorted to our site was a great service. The grounds are immaculate and the team were constantly working to ensure the sites were maintained to the best standard we have ever seen. All amenities were spotlessly clean at all times. We will definitely be back.
For newbies to caravanning this is a great place to settle down for a free day’s.
Love this place. Was so quiet.

Lovely large grassed sites. Spotless amenities. Huge camp kitchen and games/relaxing room.
Loved that the pla y apace for kids focus is physical plat. Bike track, adventure playground. As a person who usually prefers bush camping to over crowdedbholiday parks this park was a pleasant surprise. If you like cycling Dunsborough and Busselton both cyclable. Short drive to beaches and at night a family winery 700m walk away that offers live music and movie nights. We were there this time with grandies but will definitely be returning.

First time here and we will be back for sure. By far the best amenities we have utilised. Ensuite bathrooms so very well maintained and clean with actual water pressure in the shower you don’t need to run around!!
Camp kitchen and games area is magnificent! Kids play area has so much for kids to do! Sites are big, grassed, green and well maintained. Very central to activities in the area! Food truck on the weekend a very welcome surprise! 10/10 for sure.
Quiet caravan park. Good size, grassed sites. Facilities clean with good camp kitchen facilities.  Dogs allowed, close to dog beach. Caravan Park has a fenced dog exercise area and some fenced sites.

Great dog friendly caravan park.  The enclosed sites are ideal and allowed our dog to relax without being tethered to a lead.  The grounds are well maintained and facilities are clean and tidy too.  While its a short distance from the beach, Dunsborough and Busselton are only a short drive away.  Well situated for wineries and coffee.

We recently stayed there for the Bully's Campout Annual get together for 2026 and had a wonderful time. The park is now under new ownership and the staff and owners made us all very welcome. The sites are still maintained with lovely grass under foot which helps keep the areas cooler in the hot days. The facilities are still kept in very clean condition and we look forward to some more time camping as well as the annual get together.|Recommended park.

We stayed here over the long weekend with another family and had a wonderful camping experience. The grass areas, public toilets, and kitchen facilities were all very clean and well maintained. The newly built kids’ playground was a great bonus for the children.
The location is also very convenient, with many attractions and beaches only a short drive away. We would definitely love to come back again!

Sites are great I really love the addition of the new playground. After coming here a lot before it was taken over by big 4 you can really notice the personality of the park has gone, and the vibe around the camp kitchen at night isn’t really there. Used to be a really fun vibe to go back to and hangout with everyone at the end of the day. Only one night of live music and there wasn’t wine tasting but just wine sales one night. Park is still very clean and nice facilities but a bit of a shame the vibe has gone.

Wunderschöner Platz! Unser Late-Check in war super einfach und auch unsere Site zu finden wurde uns sehr erleichtert (siehe Bild).
Duschen und Toiletten sind sehr sauber, der Platz ist ruhig und wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt!

Went back for first holiday since BIG 4 took over, holidayed there on 10 or 12 times when Nat and Todd owned it much more friendler, Staff at the moment are not so don't wave or acknowledge you,but still a great park great sites and camp kitchen and toilets,will be back.

Relaxed, large sites, dog friendly, always trying to provide extras to make your stay better, such as food vans, entertainment and a dog area where the furry friends can run off leash. Close to the vineyards, alternative shopping and foodstuffs.

Excellent campground! Large sites with beautifully maintained soft grass. The family bathrooms are such a good idea - you have your own shower, toilet, basin and mirror with heaps of room. Well equipped camp kitchen. Cleanliness of all amenities is to a very high standard. Staff are lovely. Highly recommend.

Thank you for a lovely stay
Large sites , dog friendly 🥰
Ablutions large and clean 😊
Friendly staff
Great caravan park, good size sites, awesome facilities and friendly staff, the location is great too as you don't get lots of foot traffic so it feels very safe being slightly out of the way
Beautiful caravan park between Busselton and Dunsborough lovely sites and great amenities.

A very clean and well run caravan park with clean and modern facilities & shaded sites with green grass. The caretakers put a lot of effort into ensuring the grass is kept in best conditions possible. Park is just out of town with loads of big open spaces. Great if you have a pet or children.
Also it’s worth staying here just to have the local free range chickens pop in to visit each evening for sippers.

This has very spacious sites to park your mobile hotel. Services was great, fast, organised with no dilly dallying. We ha e chosen the pen site as we have our Fur Baby with us, such a great idea. Clean, fresh and green.
We had a great family stay over the Oz day weekend. Great facilities for dogs and humans. Just needing more bbqs and a pool

Another fantastic stay for Australia Day at Southern Stars.

A brilliant atmosphere, dog friendly, live music, food trucks, morning coffee van and perfectly placed to walk through to Lentedal Winery!

Thank you, we will be back! 🤩
We had a lovely grassed area with plenty of room and the ablutions were very clean. We enjoyed the coffee van and using the large camp kitchen and other facilities provided.

We had a wonderful trip! The park had lovely grass sites ( which is so rare!!) the team worked very hard to ensure it stayed so green and useable ! We loved the huge sites we had - easy to configure our van, teenagers tents and shared communal area
Lovely friendly team that work at the park too
We loved the bootscooting !!
Everything was very well maintained - and the team were so helpful on the day we left when our car had a flat battery !

Will definately be returning !

For a while now my wife Sam and myself have been looking for our “go to” caravan park, and it has been quite a search. Good news is, our search is over, we have finally found our “go to” park.
From the time you arrive you are made welcome, staff golfing type buggies direct you to your spot and help you park and then setting up all you can smell is fresh mown, lush buffalo grass to kneel on while getting yourself organised. All camping sites are on this beautiful lawn daily watered and manicured. Centrally located to Dunsborough and Busselton- you can’t beat this little piece of paradise. We will definitely be back 🥰

We weren't sure how the new owners would go, as the previous ones were excellent.

But, not much has changed. Amenities still spotless. Friendly staff. Same vibes.
Has Big Rig sites and fenced areas for dogs and kids.

This is a lovely green grassed Caravan Park which I joined my family with over Christmas. They enjoyed that they could have their dog there and there were many people with dogs in the park.
For me, I prefer the older style brick ablution blocks compared to the new prefab individual toilet and shower, they became hot and not everyone cleaned up after themselves 😔
Generally the staff was welcoming and responsive, my parents have booked to return next year

Arrived on Xmas day, and was so peaceful and relaxing. Grounds are pristine and well maintained. Facilities are top notch, seperate ensuites rather than block facilities is great. The fenced sites are a great idea. Everyone has been friendly and respectful. The location is great too. 10mins to Dunsborough and 15 to Margs. Would love to come back again.

This place is awesome..cabin is new,neat and clean as all the appliances and furniture.
Easy check in with a friendly team as well as check out.
Great place to relax and enjoy.
The camp itself is well maintained and all facilities in working order.
It will, definitely, be on our list for the next holiday trip..

We stayed 3 nights at Dunsborough Big 4 in our caravan on a powered site , so can’t comment on the accommodation but I’m sure it would be absolutely top notch as the rest of the park was 😊👍. The staff were very friendly and helpful, the amenities were all very clean , fantastic camp kitchen and games room , live entertainment, food and coffee vans . Big beautiful grassy sites , so much room on each site . And the location is perfect for a base to explore the beautiful southwest region. Thanks again team we will definitely be back .

Kindest regards
Bett & Darren Barrett.😊

We usually stay at another caravan park but chose to stay here last minute and we are so glad we did. The grounds are immaculate, the staff are so friendly and welcoming, the camp kitchen and games area are so well kept and the ablutions are really well cleaned. Also the washers and dryers have tap to pay so you dont need cash. Had one of the taps fall apart when my youngest went for a shower but they came and it was repaired within half an hour. Cant wait to see what other improvements they make. We will be back again soon

Wir haben es geliebt und konnten gar nicht genug bekommen, sodass wir unseren Aufenthalt mehrfach verlängert haben :) Mit Abstand der beste Campingplatz im Umkreis. Ruhig, sauber, ordentlich. Die Waschräume sind immer in einem top Zustand. Das Personal ist einfach nur freundlich und hilfsbereit. Und die Hühner runden das ganze noch ab!

Die Waschmaschine können übrigens mit Karte bezahlt werden, was wirklich super hilfreich war!

Tolle Strände und Ausflugsziele in der Nähe. Supermärkte und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten ebenfalls. Fussläufig erreichbar ist ein tolles Weingut wo es guten Wein, leckere Waffeln und Pizza gibt.

Können es wirklich nur weiterempfehlen und würden jederzeit wieder kommen 😊

Firstly, as you arrive into the park it has the wow factor. It is beautiful. We are from QLD doing the lap of Australia, honestly, this is the best caravan park we've been in. The amenities are spotlessly clean. We watch the girls cleaning them from our van in the mornings and there is nothing that is not cleaned. Even the clothes line gets a wipe. The grounds are beautifully kept. There is a great sense of pride in the work all the staff perform. The sites are a great size. This is our second time here. We have spare time here in WA and without question, this was the park we wanted to come back to. The playground is a child's dream. Dogs are so welcome here. They have the best set up if you are travelling with a dog. The location is smack bang in the middle of the most beautiful turquoise beach and fantastic wineries and breweries all around. Make this park a must visit on your travels, you won't be disappointed.
The park is luscious & green. Staff are friendly & helpful. Facilities are great. Sites are huge. The atmosphere is fantastic. Chase the Ace is a great night.
We loved our stay with you guys @southerstar holiday park, we will 💯 % be back. We are new to caravanning and this was our first stay using the van. The bench mark has been set now 😉….. thank you 🙏🏼
Very friendly and helpful staff. The place is very well looked after, the kitchen is comfortable, the bathrooms are clean and there are large fridges available to everyone. Excellent experience

What an amazing spot! We have spent just under a week here and it’s been fantastic! Beautifully grassed, generous size sites, spotless ablutions and a lovely camp kitchen/entertainment area. We arrived on a Saturday to a lovely campfire, wood fired pizzas and live music which helped us relax and ease into our holiday. The staff were always friendly and helpful. Even our big kids had fun on the zip line and nature playground. Location is perfect too. Thank you Team Southern Stars for a wonderful stay! We can’t wait to come back!

Great caravan park - spacious sites, clean modern bathroom spaces that include loo shower and handbasin in individual rooms - even a stool provided for those who may need extra support. Hosts text you to let you know what’s happening on site - eg food bans, coffee vans, live music.  Very dog-friendly with off-leash space and option to book a fenced site.  The park feels open, they even escort you to your spot and can assist with parking the caravan.  Really good vibe.  Quiet at night.  Well worth spending a good few nights there - we’ll be back for a longer stay!

Stayed in a fenced (dog) site.  This I would say is the best caravan park we have ever stayed at.  The lawns are immaculate, the staff amazing, the toilet/shower all in one amenities spotless. Big off lead dog exercise area, fantastic kids adventure playground.   Didn't go to camp kitchen but looked fabulous driving past.  They are very strict on 1pm check in for site and you can see why.  The guy doing the lawns has a huge area to maintain, so don't be one of those people who get there early.  Highly recommend! Wish we booked for longer

We had a lovely stay at BIG4 Dunsborough Southern Stars.  The park is spotless, peaceful and well run. Staff are friendly, the facilities are good, and the location is perfect for exploring Dunsborough and the surrounding area.  Highly recommend - we’ll definitely be back!

Just spent 3 nights here and absolutely loved it. The staff were very friendly, we were guided to our site and to top it off he spotted for my husband to park the van, that will save many arguments 🤣
The sites are beautifully grassed, lots of shady trees, spotless ablutions and very dog friendly. One of the best in our opinion.
One of the best stays we have been at.

We spent three nights here and absolutely loved it. The campsite is clean, the facilities are great, and we had so much fun in the games room. The man who attended us was incredibly kind and nice, people like him make travelling so worth it. We arrived after reception hours and he was still extremely welcoming and helpful. Truly the best campsite in the area, surrounded by beautiful wildlife. Highly recommended!

Lovely campsite. Great facilities and well laid out.
Keep up the great work Southrrn Stars!!

We Loved staying at dunsborough Southern star caravan Park big sites staff went out of there way to help everyone friendly  and very clean we loved the ablutions block ,we asked to be put on a site near our family and there it was no problem  😊

Great carvan park huge sites with lush lawn right through the park can see that park is really well kept lady in reception so helpfull i very seldom do reviews has to be good for me to do one also close to vase which has great littlle shopping centre will be back.

No WiFi. Yep, I get that people are camping but very nice girl at the desk said park was too big. Maybe 2 then? Just a thought. Bathrooms were dongas, but excellent and clean, kitchen was pretty basic for a Big 4, but again, clean. Dogs were allowed on leash or in an enclosure and nobody barked after hours- perfect! Grounds are immaculate and my window got stuck open- groundsman very nicely fixed it for me. Would I stay again? If there was nothing left with WiFi- definitely. The cheeky chooks climbed into the van. Very cute and left no trace- thanks girls!

Great spot for all ages. The kids had plenty of space to play, and the zip line and BMX track were definite highlights. There’s also an oval that’s perfect for furry friends. The grounds are beautifully maintained, with lush green grass, and the amenities are clean and generously sized. The service was excellent, and the location is close to a variety of restaurants and parks. We would definitely book again!
Awesome spot,quiet and surrounded by paddocks. lovely flat ground, for Caravan and green grass everywhere and a couple of different play areas for all children.
Always happy when the rotties are happy.
Great place but if you allow dogs if owners don’t pick up you must
Such a great park. Very dog friendly.  Lovely space for dogs to run around in dog run area. Also dog sites are great. Nice and green as well.

Wow right from bookings to stay was one of the best.
They accomadated my husband in the wheelchair.
Arrived they escorted us to our spot helped me get in my spot.. never had that before.
The bathrooms were amazing toilet and shower in one so you have your privacy. So nice and ckean.
The kids play area is awsome. The grounds are super clean . They had coffee van every morning and organised food vans at night.
If I could rate this park 100 I would.  Its the best I have been in.. well done to all the team involved you have done yourselves proud..

One-off the best caravan parks I have stayed in. Beautifully maintained large grassed sites facilities were fantastic and staff were welcoming. Our caravan club just stayed for the weekend Im sure everyone would say the same. Well done

Fabulous caravan park. Beautiful lush green grass, everything kept clean and tidy. Ablutions blocks are very clean and serviced regularly. Huge camp kitchen with fantastic relaxation room equipped with lounge chairs and lounges for conversation or reading. I highly recommend this park to all ☺️

Very organised and super clean ablution block in beautiful surroundings. Greeted by staff on arrival who guided us through the site and assisted with parking the van. All done and dusted in five minutes. Amazing service. We had fenced site to contain our dogs which worked beautifully. Large off lead paddock available for exercise which dogs loved. Daily text messages from Admin informing of coffee van, food vans etc on site. Couldn’t fault this place. Highly recommended.

Excellent park! We had a recent visit with 75 caravans from our group and found the park in pristine condition and were welcomed like we were all part of the family. This is the first time we have been since Ben and Big4 have taken over and we’re very impressed with the great job they are doing. All the staff were very accommodating to our large group and all our members had a fantastic time and we all look forward to returning next year.

We recently had a large group event at the park with 75 vans and found Ben and his staff very helpful and accommodating, the park is still one of the best I have been to and is kept in pristine condition. We will all be back next year.

Sadly, it’s not the same ☹️ The park is still beautiful and well kept but we didn’t have a great experience this time round.

We visited over the Halloween weekend, having been there several times over the years, we were really looking forward to it.

We were allocated a site that was too small for our van and couldn’t access the gate properly without climbing over our drawbar (not fun at night and a few bruises), no access at the rear as spare tyre within cms of the fence.

I mentioned this to the staff and the owner kindly visited the site to explain the situation blaming the previous owner and  reiterated that we couldn’t be moved at any stage over our 4 day visit but would consider providing an extra nights accommodation at another date.

A nice offer but unfortunately our professional careers do not allow for regular holidays and this was the first time we were able to both take leave and get away for nearly a year, so whilst appreciated, it isn’t something we would be able to utilise any time soon.

The people next to us, in an unfenced site kept letting their not so friendly dog run around, not cleaning up after it (it kept defecating by our fence near our dog) and continuously played their loud music for hours on end, including after quiet time.

Unruly kids that the parents just kept screaming profanities at. We pretty much stayed in our van to escape the chaos.

We ended up cutting our trip short by two days as it was just the complete opposite of what we are accustomed to at the park.

It actually made me sad to leave feeling the way we did. It was always our go to for a relaxing break.

Great place, very large sites some with fencing around so your dog doesn’t have to stay tied up while at the campground.  Has fantastic amenities which are cleaned daily, an enormous camp kitchen and lounge room adjacent to it.  A communal fire pit where the managers hold a meet and greet daily around 5pm (times do vary but this information is given at check in).  Has a brilliant off leash dog area and a great children’s playground.

What an amazingly clean and well kept park. We stayed for a long weekend in our van on a powered pitch. The staff were extremely friendly and helpful. The facilities are very well maintained and kept very clean. The communal area is great and the grass is kept looking lush. ||We will definitely be back!
Great facilities, well maintained and love how grassy the grounds are!
One of the best caravans parks I have ever stayed in.

The place is still the same as it’s always been which is lovely. Just the staff are super rude. We stayed the other week and since selling to Big4 the staff are rude and not as helpful as it used to be.
Still a lovely place to stay just don’t expect warm or nice staff, sad as it’s tainted the place for us now.
Great camp site,very spacious camp ground, lovely grass. We camp here for 2 nights and had lots of fun, will def come back again sometime.
Amazing caravan park, big grassy sites, clean facilities, dog friendly, enclosed dog area, games area. So peaceful. So tidy. Love love love.
Great pet friendly caravan park. Great staff

First time staying here and was impressed. Place was very clean and facilities were well maintained. Grass area always well groomed. Only thing was the communal firepit was not large enough and there was only one. The nights we stayed there, same people gathered around it so kids can’t roast their marshmallows, something they always look forward to when camping
Beautiful green grass friendly staff just amazing
Unreal park! Spacious sites, lush green grass & top amenities. Everything was awesome. 10/10 stay! Can’t wait to come back!!

This is such a well kept park. The caravan sites are grassy and really large. You dont feel like you are cramped in.  Great camp kitchen with good facilites. Over the long weekend, they had wine tasting and food trucks. Very dog friendly park. Staff are friendly and helpful.
Fantastic caravan park, plenty of room for large vans. Host's are awesome. Have stayed here 3 times and will definitely be back again.
First time camping in WA. This park was neat and tidy. Well kept. Had all we needed. Dog friendly. Will definitely come again
thanks for the experience

Good caravan park clean big sites tidy toilets and showers but owners are not the best a little bit smiles and a change of attitude would go along way,we all have bad days but some people have bad year's 3.5 out of 5 stars here
Amazing amenities from time you drive in , staff fantastic and considerate, fenced sites for the dogs , large free space for dogs to run ..

Absolutely love this place, we have been many times and every stay is perfect.  The pitches are really spacious, the amenities are spotless and the company is second to none.  Todd and Nat are great hosts and have a fabulous place.  We would recommend Southern Stars to anyone who wants a relaxing, friendly stay.  Perfect to take pooches with the fenced exercise area, you can also book a fenced pitch too.  Across the road, just a short walk through the vineyard is Lentedal Winery, perfect place for an afternoon drink and wood fired pizza, or warmed camembert and bread.

Amazing staff , facilities everything is so easy we get a fenced area for our two Great Danes , there is ample room for them to run , had grandkids and they lived the whole experience, felt very safe and staff went above and beyond |We’ve had 3 visits and looking forward to till the next time

We've just spent 10 days here camping and booked another week later in the year before we left! Great caravan park, spacious feeling even during busy school holidays. Love the bathroom set-up, each room has a shower, sink, loo, power point etc so its like having a whole bathroom to yourself. The staff are so lovely and attentive, great energy here. Location is perfect, close enough to everything to be convenient but out of town to feel like your away from it all.
Perfect spot for camping with dogs! The area is spacious, clean, and dog-friendly, making it easy to relax and enjoy the outdoors with our furry companions.

Just stayed for 3 nights in a fenced caravan lot. Beautiful grounds, relaxing and lovely staff. My only 2 issues were you are not allowed to have a fire pit in ANY pit except the style you can rent from them which is a pot style with a chimney. Totally took out the one thing we love most about camping in winter which is sitting around the fire as a family. Roasting marshmallows and relaxing. Could not achieve this with the pot style fire pit at all. We have chopped up wood ready to go for our normal fire pit and none of it even fitted in the little pot fire thing. Also when we booked we were told we could only use a mat on the concrete pad in our assigned lot. Due to them wanting to maintain the grass. I completely understand this concept however for a 22ft van with 3 adults, 2 kids and 2 dogs the concrete area was tiny. Maybe 2.5 x 2m. Not near enough room for a clean area under the alfresco for all to sit around and be comfy. Beautiful looking place and lovely staff but these 2 things are enough for us not to go back. Especially in winter with no fire pit.

*** edit to post after receiving reply**

Thanks for your reply.

Unfortunately a communal firepit is not something we want to or can use as we have 2 children with autism (they can't handle a gathering of people, hence why we always travel with and use our own fire pit) and as per your own policy we had 2 dogs with us who could not be left unattended at our caravan site.

Furthermore to your suggestion about a regular powered site that would allow for a  bigger set up.

That unfortunately is again not a viable option as your whole caravan park does not allow the use of mats on any grassed area so this is not a solution that would have provided anymore usable area than the one we had.

I am not trying to be negative but I do think a review should be honest so other people know what they are in for when they stay at your park. The reality is that these rules were things that made your park a place we will be unable to stay at in the future.

Exceptional.
It was so very obvious that the staff love what they do, and they were so warm and friendly.  The holiday park has been so carefully designed for families- an awesome pump track, flying fox and fab playground, table tennis, air hockey- and lots of space to run and explore. The option of food trucks on the long weekend, wine tasting, live entertainment one night- and then coffee available in the morning. Happy kids and happy parents.
The family bathrooms were perfect and lovely and clean. So many options for families with dogs- lots of happy pups around and the fenced in dog play area was such a bonus.

Great location to explore the region. Tent sites were proper grass and meticulously maintained.

Just fab!

We stayed in a caravan at the site.The site was so clean ,lots of room and the grass was lovely and green.It was a public holiday so there was entertainment and food trucks available.Coffee available too in the morning. We will definitely be going back .

5* plus for this amazing caravan park
Lovely and friendly staff when booking in
Beautiful green grassed large sites
Ablutions spotless and clean
Loved that Doug came to say hello everyday
Maintenance staff out everyday attending to the grounds
Highly recommend this park, you will not be disappointed

Beautiful Park, But Inflexible Policies & Retroactive T&C Changes Left Me Sleeping on the Street

We booked a powered site for 16–18 May 2025 (Booking #24814) under my friend’s name. His vehicle arrived at 5 PM and received the gate code, setting everything up—but I was the second car. Due to work commitments in Perth, I couldn’t make it by 8 PM and ended up arriving around 8:50 PM. The confirmation email stated only that “Check-In is strictly between 1 PM and 8 PM,” with no mention that all vehicles must arrive by that time.

Shortly after his check-in, they told us that everyone listed on the booking had to be at reception by 8 PM, and I received an SMS reiterating this cutoff. I immediately called to explain I was finishing work, would hit heavy traffic, and asked if they could simply leave an extra parking sticker with my friend for me to collect in the morning—but they flatly refused any workaround.

Major Issues:

Hidden “all vehicles” requirement
The email never made clear that every vehicle on the booking needed to arrive before 8 PM—this detail was buried in the full Terms & Conditions on their website, which I only saw after my stay.

Retroactive T&C changes
After I mentioned I would leave a review, I noticed those exact T&C lines now read differently in the website, suggesting the policy was tweaked after my complaint.

No alternative or refund offered
Despite paying AU $78 for that night, and offering a perfectly reasonable self check-in solution, they refused both the workaround and my request for a one-night refund.

Forced to sleep outside
With no sticker and no other option, I had to sleep on the street—feeling unsafe and deeply unfairly treated—simply for arriving 50 minutes after an arbitrary cutoff, even though the reservation holder was already inside.

Positive Highlights:

Restrooms are spotless and exceptionally well maintained—hygiene is clearly a priority.

Common areas and campsites are thoughtfully laid out, creating a peaceful, picturesque environment.

If you value flexibility, transparency, and genuine customer care, consider this a cautionary tale before booking

I am extremely disappointed with our experience with this caravan park. Due to unforeseen circumstances, our adult daughter, who suffers from Multiple Sclerosis, became very unwell and had to come home to stay with us. We reached out to the park to request a reschedule of our three-night stay, but were told that we couldn't make any changes because we didn't give two weeks' notice in advance.

To make matters worse, they had already taken both our deposit and final payment but refused to refund any of it, even though our situation was out of our control. It's incredibly frustrating and upsetting to see such a lack of flexibility and compassion from the park’s management. Their rigid policies have made an already stressful situation even worse, and it feels as though they care more about money than the well-being of their guests. We won’t be returning and would caution others to be wary of how they handle exceptional situations.

Be aware they have a ruthless cancellation policy. Less than 2 weeks notice means no refunds and no rescheduling. I'm sure there are other parks that are similar but it's the worst I've come across. Will not book again.

He certainly knows what he is doing, making the job so much easier. The whole area is lush green well kept lawns. The amenities are very clean. The stay is so peaceful and relaxing. Your not on top of each other, plenty of space between vans. I highly, highly recommend the park 👍

Golly just want prices for powered or unpowered sites, have put in dates until February 11 2025 and all I get is unavailable, is it so hard just to put up prices on your Web page, given up, not happy jan
3rd visit, and we were all welcome. A bit pricey, but the facilities are up to date and very clean. Great for dogs, with fenced in sites and an off lead paddock.

Staff were friendly and helpful. Nothing was too much trouble. As a newbie caravaner they gave me reverse parking guidance. I was part of a large group and SSHP organised a wine free wine tasting and a games event.
The facilities are excellent and super clean. The spaciousness of the separate bathrooms in the ablution block are to die for. Would be excellent for mums and dads with young children.
The grounds are in excellent condition due to the great care in watering and fertilisation between each campers stay.
The dog enclosures are great - in fact my small dog, who’s only used to a small villa with patio, was a tad overwhelmed 😀.
This park is a short drive to both  Dunsborough and Busselton with all other attractions offered in the surrounding area within easy reach.
Highly recommended.

Immaculate caravan park with huge grassy sites, which are kept in excellent condition. Camp kitchen was great. Apart from a smallish play area for kids, a table tennis table and an air hockey table in the camp kitchen area, there is not much else to keep the kids occupied. The camp does not have a pool, which for some families may pose an issue.
Ablution block situated at the big rig area is dated and small. The second ablution block is new and immaculately kept. There is ample area for dogs on the grounds, providing they are kept on a leash, which sadly some caravanners chose to ignore. Our little lap dog, unfortunately, is not very social. Thus we continually had to look out for dogs off leash. There is a huge exercise area for dogs off-leash at the back of the park.
Our dogs love the doggies walk area central to all geograhe regions attractions
Wouldn't stay anywhere else down south!

Excellent park
Beautiful grass sites
Great amenities
Great hosts

This was the best caravan park I’ve ever stayed in. Beautiful green grass sites, amenities & kitchen spotless, so peaceful and the staff were so friendly and great to have a chat to. Keep up the amazing work and I hope I’ll be back again one day!!!

Best place for camping!

Loved the intimacy of it! The grass is super healthy and green. Nice facilities and bathrooms / showers are cleanest I’ve ever seen! So good!!

Camp dog Doug is a legend!  Our boy loved it and was super welcomed by all!  Nice people everywhere and good vibes from all!

Big off leash play space for puppers as well! Huge sites that can be fenced or open. Great size!

Wine tasting was great! Also loved the vineyard next to the campsite! So lovely and has loads of animals to see! Awesome pizza.

So close to everything but out the way enough to feel “away from it all”

All the team were super amazing, feels like we have been going there for years 😂

Loved it! Can’t wait to come back again soon!

Would love to stay longer next time, as 2 days went too quickly! 😬

Outstanding! Prob the best camping spot we have been to. Spotless location all the way from campsites to toilets. Groundsmen worked so hard all day to maintain the most gorgeous grass and standards in the park. We arrived just before 8pm as we had a breakdown on the way and nothing was too much trouble for the lady who came to show us our site. Highly recommended. A relaxing week had by us all - including our dogs who loved the fenced site. Thankyou and I wish this business all the success it deserves.
Amazing park. Friendly, clean,great hosts.  Cannot say anything negative.  Just spent 2+ weeks here. Can't wait to come back in December 🥲
Der Besitzer ist super freundlich und die Campingplätze sind sehr gross. WC, Duschen und Küche sehr modern ausgestattet und ausgesprochen sauber.
Wir haben eine Nacht auf dem Camping verbracht. Der Besitzer ist sehr freundlich und der Platz sehr schön. Die Toiletten und Duschen sind sehr sauber.

Amazing staff, fantastic clean amenities, beautiful lush grassed sites with ample room to enjoy your privacy. Great atmosphere within the site, there is a car that drives through in the morning that you can purchase fresh bakery items from and a food truck was there on the Saturday night. Fantastic place to set up as a base while exploring the South West. Loved our stay and highly recommend.
One of the best caravan Park's we've been to

OMGosh what an absolutely lovely experience, from the time of booking all the way to departure.
Staff were absolutely amazing!
Everything about this park was fantastic.
The park was clean, lawns immaculate.
The staff were engaging the entire time.
We will definitely be booking in to stay again and bringing our family and friends.
Thank you Todd and staff for a truly memorable weekend!

We checked in with a caravan and greeted with a big smile. There was nothing  too much for them even the small things were noticeable. Very well organised. Powered and unpowered sites.  We were in a group of 50 vans so they had their work cut out for them. They were amazing. The park it self was incredible and very clean, the lawns were 5 star. Showers and camp kitchen were spotless. Thank you for making our stay one to remember.   Sue and Mick Collins

Great, dog, family and large group friendly place to stay. Excellent facilities,  camp kitchen, huge lounge area, lush green lawns (which I am told are kept that way through summer) and games (e.g. badminton, airhockey) and play equipment to amuse all. I noticed dog enclosures you can get with a site. Nice to have the individual cubicles with shower and toilet. Loved walking over to the coffee kiosk for an excellent coffee in the morning. Very close to Lentedel Winery, which has woodfired pizza on the weekends (and very nice wine too) .
Great place and great people

I brought my family from Brazil for a small road trip around down south and we had an incredible time at the long weekend in September.

Amazing structure of the camping.  Great for kids as well.
Super recommend!

A great park with spacious grassed sites and excellent facilities. A lovely quiet location with beautiful lush rural surrounds it makes a great alternative to the often crowded and expensive parks closer to the beaches. Highly recommended
Great campsite to stay at, we've been a couple of times now, spacious and clean facilities. Really enjoyed our stay this time having local wine tasting and local musicians

First time here but I don't think anyone comes here only once. Felt very welcomed although we arrived around 7PM. Spacious site, clean and beautiful scenery. Perfect for kids and dogs. See you next time :)

Thanks to Todd, Nat and all the amazing team at Southern Star holiday Park Dunsborough. With wide open spaces, immaculate facilities and grounds. We were looked after 100%. With child friendly play areas we never heard a thing and even with dog areas it was a pleasure to stay. We are already telling friends and thinking of our next stay. Thanks so much to all for a great experience.  Zara and Glenn.
Firstly the staff are amazing, secondly the grounds upkeep is amazing and thirdly the amenities/sites are amazing too. Ps the best sites are the ones that have the dog fences.

Great park- plenty of open space & you are not sandwiched like many parks.Facilities are clean and it's a peaceful place close to incredible beaches & walk trails.Live music & food vans plus a fabulous play ground makes it unique.Friendly warm staff and efficiently responsive- really well managed indeed.
However rather pricey  compared with Perth ( at least by $155 additional per week yikes ! ) but yet to compare with other parks near by in this region.
But if value for money isn't a deterrent - Highly recommend!

This is the best caravan park I have stayed at on our lap of Oz.

The amenities are first class. The camp kitchen and separate lounge area with plenty of comfy sofas, is superb.

Conditions allowing there us a campfire every night for people to gather around.

It accepts pets and has an offleash area as well as areas where you can park your caravan in a fenced area for your pet to have more freedom within your own confines.

First rate service, taken to your site and then helped to line up to ensure you have all the room available to you for awnings and your belongings.

Amazing I stayed for 3 nights with a group. Beautifully kept park and wonderfully dog friendly. My two enjoyed the off leash area. A campfire to gather around in the late afternoon and the weather was kind! Fully equipped camp kitchen.
We will definitely be back.

Fantastic place to stay. Beautifully kept grass sites. Super friendly owners who have added those touches that make a stay memorable. We had to fly to Sydney for a few weeks and they stored our van on site. When we flew back the van was already placed on site for us! Very convenient to Busselton airport and half the price flying to Sydney compared to Perth.
Everything about this park is 10/10 . Stayed for 5 nights. I wish I had booked longer . Anyone thinking of setting up a caravan park should use this as the model to go by

What a fantastic park, so clean, friendly and nothing is out of place. When you enter the girl on reception Sheree (sorry if its wrong ) and her husband are amazing, nothing is too much trouble  .  The campsite bathrooms are massive easily 3m x3m each one and there are plenty.  Showers are new and hot and the girls cleaned them at least twice a day when we were there , spotless.    Dogs loved our time here because not only did we have a gated site which meant they didn't have to be tied up but there is a huge off leash park with a bench where we sat with a glass of wine as the sun went down,  whilst the dogs played.  Doug the dog (owners dog) was as friendly as the staff .  This is the best campsite in WA hands-down .  We have booked another four dates in advance.   Thanks guys this was amazing !

The best park we have stayed at great staff, the best kitchen and biggest , Tv room huge. A lot of thought has gone into this park to encourage visitors  the not so squeezly sites are unbelievable, well done guys  10 0ut of 10 GG

This holiday park would be the nicest park we have stayed in super clean ,lovely friendly staff you can tell they go out of there way to help with your needs.
Feels like you have had a holiday.

We booked a dog penned site for 9 days.
The Caravan Park including facilities and grounds are in excellent condition and well maintained.
We found the staff to be very helpful and responsive.
The location is central to Busselton, Dunsborough and Margaret River which provides opportunities for site seeing, eating out or just relaxing.
We would recommend this caravan for any short or long stay

We stayed here for 2 nights in our campervan and what a great find it was! Excellent location to explore the Margaret river and Busselton areas and the park itself is just perfect. The bathroom facilities are ensuite style and exceptionally clean.
The camp kitchen is functional and very inviting and our site was very spacious.  The staff were so lovely, welcoming and informative....Southern Stars Holiday Park is exceptional on everyway
Friendly and helpful staff with good facilities. Would highly recommend if you are looking for somewhere to stay

Highly recommended
Very green and nice
Super clean
We loved camp fire and raffle
My son enjoyed the bike track
Definitely will be back
Wow what a lovely park... Beautiful.

I would like thank the great staff and owners, the Holiday park was everything and more than what we expected. Great holiday park for travelling with dogs. We stayed in the dog fenced site and we really enjoyed it. Thank you

I stayed in my own van for only one night so really can't comment on the rooms.  Service was excellent being met at the gate after dark (yeah - it's winter now and dark at 5.30pm!) and shown to my site.  Emailed info gave me all I needed to know and the showers and camp kitchen were spotless.  I would highly recommend this camp.
Not a hotel. It's a caravan park, but the best we have experienced in a long time. Really enjoyed Max, the resident dog who likes showing you to your site and enjoyed our cheese.
It's a super chilled atmosphere...gorgeous night sky
Nice new facilities, friendly staff and dog friendly
Lovely Place.  There is room to swing a bat without hitting a cat. Really Big sites, compared to a lot of places. Staff guide you to your site and assist you in parking your van.
Very good caravan park and owners are friendly helpful. Definitely suggested.
If you want the best park in the Southwest then look no further than SSHP. Brilliant 6 stars 🌟
Had a beautiful grassy unpowered site. Faculties were clean and modern, with a huge camp kitchen and indoor area. Will absolutely return 😁

Great Great place .. so Neat, Clean and Green.. The people that run this place are so friendly..
Great for dogs .. wine tasting and a coffee shop on site .. Will definately be back Thank you 💕

Nice place to visit caravan site's are overpriced
No  TV reception
Toilets ok
Stayed just before Easter beautiful park very friendly staff in a great location

Awesome park with huge grassy sites. Very helpful and super friendly staff.
Perfect for those travelling with dogs.
Loved that there was always something going on. Pizza trucks, bakery van, Indonesian food, live music. Absolutely awesome 😎
Fantastic park 👏 Fantastically run .First time there with friends. Would definitely return. Mr G.Sullivan and Mrs N Smart. 🇬🇧
Visiting lovely

We had the best weekend at southern star. All the staff are super friendly. Camp site is immaculate. Amenities are all clean and well presented. Loved the pump track and dog exercise area. Will be back again for a weekend away.

We received a voucher for a 2 night stay when we purchased our new caravan and had a look online to see what Southern Stars had to offer.
As soon as we saw they had dog friendly enclosures on some of their sites, we opted to pay the extra (minimal extra charge) and also booked for 5 nights instead of 2, which we are so glad we did
Not only is the place beautifully kept and the best caravan park we have stayed at as far as space and overall vibe goes, but the staff were absolutely fantastic
We were met at the entry with a smile and a g'day, the lady in the office was very nice, and helpful, then we were led to our site, and were given guidance while backing in to the site which was very handy indeed
The park has everything you need and is far enough away from Dunsborough and Busselton to feel quite secluded but also you are close enough to visit either of these (and more) should you wish to
About 3-4 Km from the Vasse shopping centre for supplies too so it has a lot to offer
We will definitely be going back, and our 15 year old puppy had the best time ever, not having to be on a leash in the enclosure was fantastic for him and made it stress free for us as we didn't have to worry about him taking off or getting himself into trouble with the bigger, younger dogs haha
Thanks heaps to the team at Southern Stars Holiday Park, you are doing a wonderful job and to the owners, you have done extremely well in setting this place up
Thanks
Ollie & Garry

Fantastic campsite. Spacious, lots of greenery. Showers and facilities are kept spotlessly clean. Friendly staff and very affordable. Great location too, a short distance from many amazing nearby spots
Great Caravan park, lovely people & perfect fenced site meant that we can bring our dogs & they could relax & enjoy it as much as us!

If your looking for an amazing caravan park to stay with your dogs, you can not go wrong with Southern Stars Holiday Park. It is amazing. The fully fenced pet sites are brilliant!! So good not having to have our 2 tied up. The park facilities are immaculate. Staff are very helpful and lovely to deal with. This is our 2nd time staying here and we will definitely be booking again. Highly recommend this place.

Such a great set up here & Anniebrook is close to everything you want to do in the Yallingup/Margaret River area with chilled & relaxed glamping for us. Facilities are top notch. This is our 2nd time for the March long weekend. You can attend all the activities SSHP has on or just stick to yourselves on your site. Beautiful soft green grass, good lighting, community kitchen is fantastic. Everyone, including the humans were well behaved (we took our pooches).

Another great long weekend stay. Made use of one of the fenced sites for our doggos, great initiative.
All the sites were grassed and you are well looked after by the staff.

Fabulous lush green grass and spacious sites. Facilities are immaculate and the extra functions put in - wine tasting, live music, local meat suppliers and a food vans made for the most wonderful weekend. Doug the dog sees everyone to their site with no distractions and the staff are super friendly and helpful.

We travel with our two puppies so the fenced off exercise field is a great advantage as the pups get to enjoy a social run around.  There is also a great outdoor play area for kids.

Close proximity to Busselton, Dunsborough, Margaret River, countless wineries and eateries and the coast is not too shabby either!

Great place to stay - highly recommended.
This campsite offer good amenities and facilities. The reception staff are very friendly, smiling and pleasant. We highly recommend this campsite

Wow what a spot!! Absolutely loved this place from the booking and communication, to the warm welcoming and direction/ help on to the sites, the sites themselves- lush green flat grass!, the amenities- plenty room in the very clean wash rooms and community kitchen, playground to suit a range of ages, location to dunsborough and even walking distance to a winery. We were there over PH and had entertainment, food trucks and coffee in the AM. Can’t wait to return!

Sensational park and even better hosts. The owners go above and beyond to help make your stay as best it can be.

Dedicated exercise areas for your dogs and fenced sites so they do not have to be tethered 24/7.

The showers and toilets are spotless just like the park. The sites are large and beautifully grassed. Camp kitchen has everything you need and the activity room is an absolute bonus.

Location is superb, close enough to all the action but the park is set-up so you feel like you are in the middle of nowhere.

Do not 2nd guess a stay here.
Fantastic place to stay, nice and green with modern amenities. Relaxing. Highly recommend. Very friendly staff.
Beautiful, very well maintained, clean and tidy place to stay, wished we had stayed longer. Will definitely go back some time soon.
Great play area for kids, no shady trees and all grass everything Wet jewy in the morning

Great place, well maintained, very friendly staff.
Big shower rooms, ideal for families.
Very nice camping. The service was great. We had lots of space for our van. The toilets and showers are clean and well looked after. I can really recommend staying here.

10 out of 10, nothing can complain.

I was like WOW when I saw the bathroom, really spacious, clean and no smelly👍🏾👍🏾

Camp kitchen has a microwave, toaster, BBQ and some fridges FYI.

Lovely clean open site with lots of room.
Staff very friendly and helpful.
Camp kitchen clean and tidy and the toilets and showers were the best!
We will definitely be back.
First time here and absolutely we will be back. Staff are very friendly and helpful. I booked a fenced area for the dogs and they're loving being able to roam free. Looking forward to next time!

Best customer service we have ever experienced at a caravan park. The facilities are very clean and tidy, the grass sites are really nice and well maintained. The staff at southern stars are very friendly, helpful and happy to accommodate. 10/10 would recommend this park for both camping and caravans.
Such a great site we booked an extra night. Fantastic location and the staff are extremely friendly and helpful. Thank you.

Great place, really well looked after with spacious bays.

The staff was amazing!

We stayed for 5 nights and loved it. The sites are spacious and we didn’t feel crammed in.
The toilets and showers were immaculate.
The owner went above and beyond. Showed us to our powered site and helped guide the caravan in. We were there over the Australia Day long weekend and there were food vans each night and also a solo musician!
Thank you! We will be back!
Great Caravan Park, great staff , beautiful set up, lots to do, family and pet friendly, we will be back

Great caravan park, hidden out of the way from the busy townsites but close enough to sneak into Dunsborough or Busselton. The owners and staff are constantly moving around maintaining the grassed sites, cleaning the facilities or giving a friendly wave.

Will gladly return to this park.
Well run ,spacious sites , fenced dog/kid friendly sites, entertainment and food trucks etc

What an experience!! Read the reviews and, to be fair, there was not one negative one to be seen. With that in mind ALL those reviews were well deserved. Great staff who are super friendly and helpful. The site was supremely well maintained with facilities to entertain, preoccupy and cater for all ages. Can’t rate this site highly enough. Diolch  yn fawr! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿

Loved the large grassesd areas could of fit 3 vans in the spot what a change from the other parks in the area.
Owners were excellent made you feel very welcome and loved a chat lol.
I found that the noise curfew was upheld by the ground staff they do a trip round camp to sort any yahoos lol.
This is a spot I will come back to again and again it's quiet and central to everything.
Just don't hurt the grass as the boys love it hahah.
Well done Southern stars crew what a great site .
On my wish list for this camp is a pool that's why a 9 out of 10 is given but plenty of beaches around.
Great staff, always wave when you go past. Probably the cleanest showers/toilets I’ve seen while camping. Green grass with great communal facilities. Will definitely be coming back!

It was a good experience, and we would use again (and recommend).  Well maintained clean sites.  Helpful staff.  Clean and well arranged facilities (individual showers and toilets).  Has visiting food truck and coffee shop.  Well  located with easy access to the Dunsbrough/ Margaret River region.  Did not have a pool and could do with a few trees for shade.
Love it
great service.. great facilities.. great experience over all.. perect location.. highly recommended.
Great camping site with gorgeous lawns.  Service was outstanding

Great caravan park, one of a kind really. We stayed for 5 nights in a fenced off dog site and it was the most relaxing time we’ve camped with a dog. Off lead and no detangling of leads required, I think our dog had the best time like we did.
The staff of the park were none stop working an also loved a good chat, the friendliest buggers going around and they work their butts off and you can see they take a lot of pride in their park and their job.
We’ll definitely be back!
Cheers southern stars crew

Couldn't fault this holiday park. Awesome location, extremely well taken care of, amenities are great and best of all the staff is amazing. Definitely recommended to anyone looking to stay in this area.
Fab park with large sites. Staff are excellent. Amenities are clean and well kept.
Great place staff all friendly ablutions super clean. Central for many venues and allow pets. Can't speak highly enough.
Fantastic spot with lovely grassed sites.
Great hosts and private sites
Love it every time we come friendly staff and cool Doug Doug the dog
Great campsite, dog-friendly and the option for fenced areas for you and your fur babies too. Staff are wonderful and polite, bathrooms always clean and good water pressure

The diligent staff maintain lush green campsites even in the summer, ensuring no sand gets into our tent. The spacious, clean kitchen and bathroom are a delight. The kids' play area conveniently situated near the kitchen offers entertainment options like table tennis and air hockey, allowing parents to prepare meals while the kids have fun indoors or outdoors. Additionally, the French bakery, pizza van, and live music were all wonderful additions to the experience.
Most expensive camping spot we had between Melbourne and Perth.  70 dollars is a impertinence for 30 square meters, electricity and water, even if it is high season.
Great staff, nice location, and big lot!
Lovely staff and great stay!

We recently had 3 nights here , camping
A warm friendly greeting on arrival
Taken to our site and assistance given with reversing on to site
Awesome ensuite style amenities
Extremely dog friendly
Fenced dog exercise area on site
Which was useful, as it was quite warm during the day , so used this early evening when it was cooler
Camp kitchen , is one of the best we have seen
Large area with comfortable arm chairs
Didn’t use them , but great if you’re camping in a tent
Highly recommend
Really friendly staff, the ground is very well kept, excellent abolutions, good entertainment facilities.  Will definitely be back.

A very good campsite. Spacious grassy sites, clean modern ablutions and camp kitchen. Good kid's play area including a flying fox and footy oval. Dog friendly with a dedicated off lead fenced area.

It is also in a very good location,  close to most things and walking distance to a nice winery which also does family movies of an evening in summer.

The staff really seem to care. They are on the go constantly all day long keeping up the park, and it shows. It is absolutely spotless and maintained to the highest level.

I'm almost loathe to mention how nice it is because it will deservedly get busier and busier and we'll have trouble booking again! But they deserve a great review and your business.  We will be back, it is our new favourite campsite near Busselton.

There is no check in allowed after 8pm and then they won't allow you to enter the site you have already paid for until after 9am the following day (having you loose another half a day of your stay - once you have set up. Staff didn't care! Will never book to stay at this venue again.
Grounds were very well kept, staff was super helpful and friendly, bathrooms were amazing for a caravan park

Had a lovely 4 days at Southern Stars. The staff are so friendly and helpful. The park sites are on lovely luscious  lawns. The facilities are brilliant. From the ablution blocks that were so clean and roomy to the camp kitchen, which was so well equipped. Loved our stay and look forward to our next stay.

We stayed in the caravan park for long weekend in September this year and found the grounds to be very well kept. The grass site were large and very green. Even helped to get you into your site.  All the amenities are top class and very clean. Extras like coffee van in morning, meat van for local fresh meat and entertainment in the camp kitchen are was great.  They are also dog/ pet friendly.  We are already booked for Australia Day weekend.  Highly recommend this park.
so stingey and strict and not nice staff at all

Thanks for a great weekend Southern Stars - a perfect getaway at your beautifully kept park. Good distance from Perth. The staff were fantastic, very helpful from the time we arrived and all through the weekend, you cater for everyone, even our fur kids who had a great time in the off lead area. We will be back😎🐾🐾😎

From the time we arrived to when we left the team were the most hospitable people we have come across in a caravan park. Lusg green lawns, fantastic facilities & the fenced areas for the furbabies is the best idea ever. Loved every moment of our week there.

Beautiful piece of paradise.
We stayed on an unpowered fenced site. Beautiful grassed area. There is a fenced off lead area for your pooch to run. A bike track, awesome playground for the kids.
Chase the ace on a Friday night.
Amenities are clean and spacious.

We stayed here two days ago with our daughter and two grandkids who had never been camping before. We all had an awesome time, including both our dogs. The park is one of the best we have stayed and we have travelled all around Australia. It's a credit to the owners and all the staff. We love it that much we've booked in for another few days in two weeks time
Great, family and dog friendly caravan park.

It was a pleasure to stay at such a beautiful caravan park with fantastic large sites, very clean and tidy amenities and a beautiful camp kitchen with plenty of facilities plus a fantastic lounge/ TV room area
Will definitely go back and recommend it to all my family and friends

What a well thought out park, green lawn, great size amenities, shower/toilet block a great size for mum or dad doing the run with the kids, good size camp kitchen with evening camp fire, location was just perfect and can’t forget the amazing staff and Doug the dog!!  You guys should be so proud of what you have achieved!
What an amazing Park!!! like nothing I have seen anywhere else large sites and big open spaces for kids and big kids to run and play great facilities.  Hard to fault anything here

We loved our time at Southern Stars. We are fairly novice campers but have been to a few sites now and were very impressed! All very clean facilities. The common areas were large and welcoming, we found it very easy to prepare food and clean up. Communal fire pit was fun. We barely saw the kids due to the playground and bike track, they loved it!
The site are generous sizing, it didn’t feel like you were sleeping right next to your neighbour.
My favourite part was the individual toilet and shower facilities. Camping with kids and needing to bath them when you’re using communal stalls is always tricky, so to be able to go behind one door with the kids made life very easy!

Staff were all incredibly friendly and welcoming, even very patient when one of our kids weren’t rogue a few times 🤦🏻‍♀️ we very much appreciated that!

I’d say it’s on the more expensive side of sites, but with the facilities that they have I can absolutely see why, you’re certainly paying for quality.

We definitely hope to go again!

What a wonderful gem down south! This place is absolutely fantastic to stay at with the family. The hosts are so friendly and there is so much for children to keep them busy including a BMX pump track, footy goals, and a great playground. The grassed sites are huge and they have actual bathrooms! Dogs are also welcome and they even have some fenced in plots for dog owners.

A beautiful park with spacious sites. The games room/kitchen is very well equipped and roomy. The shower rooms are immaculate and spacious. The staff were great and made our stay most enjoyable.  A big bonus is that you can take your dog even on school holidays. We really enjoyed our stay with our two grandaughters. Will definately re-book for summer.

What a gem

From the owners to the large space !!

Clean , friendly and a good vibe

We just stayed at Southern Stars for the long weekend and absolutely loved our stay! We have nothing negative to pick about this place or the staff, ALL positive!!

We were greeted at reception by friendly staff and then taken through to our site by another lovely staff member.. believe this was Todd the owner? He took us through with his furry companion 🐶 and was helpful getting us in the site. The other guy who works on the grounds was also super friendly and helpful when we needed the baby room unlocked, or the fire pit/wood delivered. Nothing big or small was an issue for the team, they were always happy to help and always said hello or waved whenever we passed by reception or past them on the grounds.

A huge plus for us was also the individual toilet/shower rooms. This made it so much more comfortable for us. Especially with a 1.5 year old. We’ve stayed at a fair few caravan parks and it’s always a struggle getting your stuff off small storage space/hooks in a small shower cubicle. So this is absolutely a huge plus for us.

The caravan park also had a fenced off dog area where our boy could run off lead. The place is very well planned out and beautiful. Very taken care of. And also super close to activities in Dunsborough, Busselton & surrounds.

Not only the incredible caravan park but the friendly staff are also the reason we have rebooked! Wish I could give you guys more than 5 stars! Thanks for having us xx
